name: Cross Swivel
preceding_figure_names: Double Reverse Spin, Heel Pivot (Quarter Turn To Left), Reverse Pivot
following_figure_names: Tipple Chasse To Right, Running Finish, Fish Tail, Tipsy To R
notes: Alternative styling options include RF to side, knees inward; LF to side, knee inward, a little space is ok. Body forms a line, slanted straight to R, keep left side lifted. Give R side to Man. Stay connected. Turn head to R. Rise in body before next S to lower to normal (not sinking down).

comments: Alternatively for styling, RF to side, knees inward
Use hip joint to start the turn, standing knee (R knee) stays forward over the standing foot (RF), do not move the knee off the standing foot.
Use ab muscle to pull to the back of foot, do not leave middle fwd and shoulder weight back.
Heel of RF does not lower until the turn is completed.
Head is still left. At end of &: there is "up" rise feeling before the next S lower to normal.
Alternatively for styling, LF to side, knee inward, a little space is ok.
Body forms a line, slanted straight to R, keep left side lifted. Give R side to Man. Stay connected.
At end of &: rise in body before next S to lower to normal. (not "sinking down")
Body forms a line, slanted straight to R, keep left side lifted. Give R side to Man. Stay connected.
